    Recoder2KeYConverter.convert(ConstructorDeclaration cd)

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    static New
    MethodKit.createNew(ConstructorDeclaration decl)
    Make a new allocation corresponding to the constructor declaration with the same actual argument names as in the declaration.

    Factory method that creates a new type reference fitting to the constructor declaration.
